channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Africa Forward Summit Seeks to Reframe France-Africa Relations
item.description: Di Africa Forward summit, wey France and Kenya co-host for Nairobi on May 11-12, 2026, na effort to renew di partnership between Africa and France, especially for innovation and growth. This year, dem...

item.title: Street Life in Vienna in the Mid-1980s Through Vintage Photography
item.description: The mid-1980s in Vienna were a unique period where the city appeared suspended between its grand imperial history and a modern world yet to fully embrace digital technology. Vintage photographs shared...

item.title: Ramaphosa Seeks Court Approval to Challenge Phala Phala Panel Findings
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has formally requested the Chief Justice's permission to launch a judicial review of the Section 89 Independent Panel report concerning the Phala Phala incident. Under Sectio...

item.title: Paul Schrader explores concept of a ‘Taxi Driver’ sequel involving AI companionship
item.description: Paul Schrader, the screenwriter behind the iconic 1976 film 'Taxi Driver', has discussed a potential idea for a sequel in which the protagonist, Travis Bickle, engages with an AI girlfriend. Schrader,...

item.title: Frank Zappa's Quick-Witted Comeback to Joe Pyne in 1966 Talk Show
item.description: In 1966, legendary musician Frank Zappa appeared on The Joe Pyne Show, a talk show famous for its confrontational style and aggressive host, Joe Pyne. Known for his provocative and sometimes insulting...

item.title: Sociological and Economic Factors Reducing the Likelihood of War Over Taiwan
item.description: The article examines the potential for a global conflict over Taiwan, emphasizing the importance of sociological and economic realities in shaping international relations. It analyzes Donald Trump's v...

item.title: Ebola Outbreak in Central Africa Worsens Amid US Aid Cuts
item.description: The ongoing Ebola outbreak in Central and East Africa is being exacerbated by significant reductions in US foreign aid and global health funding. Public health workers report severe shortages of essen...

item.title: Alberta committee meeting on 'Forever Canadian' petition ends without vote due to procedural issues
item.description: A committee in the Alberta legislature tasked with reviewing the 'Forever Canadian' petition descended into procedural confusion on Wednesday after the United Conservative Party (UCP) issued a news re...

item.title: Bauchi South Senator Withdraws from APC Governorship Race Over Party Factionalism
item.description: Senator Shehu Umar Buba wey dey represent Bauchi South don announce say e dey withdraw from the All Progressives Congress (APC) governorship primary for Bauchi State. For one letter wey e write on 10t...

item.title: Tiwi Explains Her Break From Social Media and Rediscovering Herself Before Marriage
item.description: Tiwi, wife of Nollywood actor Kunle Remi, don share how she waka before she become married to the actor. For her new YouTube channel, Bare by Bko, she talk about how stepping away from social media he...

item.title: Horoscope Guidance for May 21, 2026: Insights for Every Zodiac Sign
item.description: Sally Brompton provides a detailed horoscope for May 21, 2026, offering insights tailored to each zodiac sign. For those celebrating birthdays today, she advises balancing generosity with self-care. A...

item.title: Axl Rose Poses with Early Mobile Phone at Sunset Grill in 1988

item.description: MANILA — The Philippine Department of Foreign Affairs (DFA) has clarified that the United Nations Human Rights Council (UN HRC) is unlikely to take any action on a statement of support submitted by th...

item.description: India and South Korea have taken a significant step in strengthening their bilateral defence and security partnership. During a ministerial meeting in Seoul, Indian Defence Minister Rajnath Singh and ...

item.title: Merna Kennedy: Remembering the Silent Film Actress of the 1920s
item.description: Merna Kennedy (1908–1944) was a talented American actress known for her contributions to the film industry during the transition from silent films to sound films. She gained fame through her performan...

item.title: Zaijian Jaranilla joins Sylvia Sanchez’s birthday celebration with Gela Atayde
item.description: Filipino actor Zaijian Jaranilla recently attended the birthday celebration of Sylvia Sanchez, mother of actress Gela Atayde. The event gathered close friends and family in a warm and festive atmosphe...

item.title: Bob Marley’s Life and Career in the 1970s: From the Wailers to Global Icon
item.description: Bob Marley, born on February 6, 1945, was a Jamaican singer, songwriter, and guitarist who became one of the most influential figures in reggae music. In the 1970s, Marley’s career transformed dramati...

item.description: Orlando Pirates legend Andries Sebola has called on the team to remain composed and follow their tried-and-tested approach as they prepare for a crucial Betway Premiership season finale against Orbit ...

item.title: Ofcom warns TikTok and YouTube fail to adequately protect children online
item.description: Ofcom has criticised TikTok and YouTube, stating that their content feeds remain unsafe for children despite existing safety measures. The regulator's report highlights that both platforms failed to c...
